📋 Proposal template selected
The full HTML proposal will be sent — including demo video, circulation platforms, and all sections.
Client will see a "View Your Design" button linking to this URL
📊 Tracking on — opens & clicks show in activity thread.
Replies go to the From address you selected above.
Mark as Paid
Email invoice to client
Branded tax invoice from accounts@adviuz.com
Tax invoice auto-generated with correct GST/HST/PST by province.
Invoice number: IWS + MMYY + 4 chars (e.g. IWS0526ABCD)
Set client location
We don’t have a location for this client yet. Set their province so quotes use the right tax and reminders send on their local time. It’s saved to their profile for next time.
Lead alert numbers
We’ll text these mobiles the instant a new lead calls or enquires. Add one or more — use numbers that can receive texts (a landline won’t work).
Confirm IVR Call
📣
Are you sure?
An automated voice call will be placed to this lead.
Existing open quote
Cancelling stops all future reminders on the old quote(s). Keeping them active means the client may still get reminders for both.
Use earnings as account credit
Turn your available earnings into flyer views in your account balance. You can then assign these views to any campaign.
Enter an amount to see how many views you'll get.

⚙️ Manage Dropdowns
Customize Source and Service options shown in the Add Lead form.
📍 Lead Sources
🛠 Services
Sales Stages
Customize your pipeline. Leads in deleted stages move to the first stage.
Add New Stage
AI Follow-ups
When a lead goes quiet, the AI prepares a follow-up message for you to review and send. For each stage, set how many days to wait before each touch (comma-separated, e.g. 1, 3, 7), and switch off any stage you don't want followed up.
🛡️ Sending Safety
Guards that apply whenever you send a follow-up.
Quiet hours — warn before texting outside these
From to (24-hour, your local time)
Days are counted from the lead's last activity. A sequence stops on its own if the lead replies.
AI Auto-Call
When a new lead comes in, the AI can call them automatically. Inbound callers are never auto-called, and calls only go out between 8am and 9pm.
Auto-call these sources
Send top-up link

Follow-ups to Review
These drafts are waiting for you. Edit the wording if you like, then Send — or Skip to discard. Nothing sends until you tap Send and confirm.
Set Appointment
Pick the date and time in the lead's local time.
Date
Time
⚙ Customize reminder timing
Appointment Reminders
When a customer has a booked appointment, we'll text them a reminder. Choose when below — all times are in the customer's local timezone.
Reminders
Quiet hours (don't text outside these)
From to (24-hour, customer's time)
Message wording
Use {name} for the customer's first name and {when} for the date & time. "Reply STOP" is added automatically.
Confirmation (texted when booked)
Reminder

Preview
📤 Auto-Send Proposals

When a partner or admin adds a sales lead, the full proposal email is sent to them automatically. Leads that already received it are never emailed twice, and a CC added later is sent the proposal too.

Auto-send proposal to new leads

🎉 Deal Closed
Capture the deal value — this powers your Reports (revenue totals, average deal size, ROI per campaign).
$
Tip: enter the total contract value, even if billed in installments.
+ Add Balance
Pick a flyer-views bundle. You'll be taken to Stripe to pay securely. Once payment succeeds, your balance is credited automatically and you'll receive an invoice + confirmation email — then you can allocate the views to any campaign.
Powered by Stripe · CAD pricing · Includes invoice + 25-second view guarantee
